scope: Ten newly selected interaction-first mechanics created after the historical Incubator and Interaction III–VI queues were fully implemented.
policy: Survey artifacts seed mechanics only. All shipped presentation, geometry, simulation code, and grading logic are original procedural HTML, CSS, canvas, JavaScript, or Python. No third-party media is redistributed.

specular_lighthouse_relay.influence: Mirror matching, coupled gears, and shadow-direction geometry.
specular_lighthouse_relay.transformation: A live four-stage analytic reflection bench with three adjustable gimbals and sustained ordered receiver locks.

wind_tunnel_seed_courier.influence: Path finding, held controls, and moving-object collection.
wind_tunnel_seed_courier.transformation: A fixed-step spatial force field with fan falloff, persistent momentum, swept gate crossings, and geometric dock capture.

hologram_silhouette_foundry.influence: 3D viewpoint, layered stacks, box folding, and spatial reasoning.
hologram_silhouette_foundry.transformation: An inverse 3D construction bench with linked orthographic occupancy masks and manipulable intangible rods.

orbital_docking_customs.influence: Coordinate placement, path finding, and frustrating parking controls.
orbital_docking_customs.transformation: A finite-fuel impulse-and-coast rendezvous requiring matched position, relative speed, and attitude.

gravity_room_freight.transformation: A procedurally searched rotating-gravity room whose capsule slides through ordered airlocks under world-frame changes.

floodgate_archive_rescue.influence: Path finding, fishing, blocking, and delivery interactions.
floodgate_archive_rescue.transformation: A mass-conserving multi-vault lock system with pumps, equalization, floating evidence transfer, and flood limits.

elastic_membrane_sorter.transformation: A four-post damped membrane whose live slope routes three persistent marbles into assigned wells.

pheromone_dispatch.influence: Runaway-target capture, fishing, and continuous grass interaction.
pheromone_dispatch.transformation: A resampled continuous field that indirectly routes a carrier swarm around salt obstacles through pickup and delivery.

clockwork_clutch_safe.influence: Gear prediction, clock reading, and inertial time wheels.
clockwork_clutch_safe.transformation: A live coupled-ratio gear train with timed clutch releases and a simultaneous three-phase terminal window.

marionette_checkpoint.influence: 3D viewpoint, fingertip targeting, and character dragging.
marionette_checkpoint.transformation: A four-string coupled kinematic puppet with sustained sequential limb checkpoints.
